title: Coal India's Stockpiles Continue to Climb
section_path: Coal India's Stockpiles Continue to Climb
section_path_text: Coal India's Stockpiles Continue to Climb
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
As we discussed in Commodore Research's most recent Weekly Executive Report, Coal India (which is responsible for over 75% of India's coal output) produced 75.7 million tons of coal last month. This is up month-on-month by 7.7 million tons (11%) and up year-on-year by 3.3 million tons (5%). Coal India's production has now grown on a year-on-year basis for two straight months.
